title: callitriche aquatica subsp. hamulata
intro: Callitriche aquatica subsp. hamulata, also known as the aquatic water starwort or water crowfoot, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Callitriche aquatica subsp. hamulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
